emails.subject: RE: Need for Rutherford Consulting Complete
emails.body: Do you have a candidate? I would argue that we are looking at a process review, so anyone who can do a process review could do this.

emails.subject: RE: Need for Rutherford Consulting Complete
emails.body: I recommend using UTSI. They know a lot about EFM and SCADA systems and have been used by Enron in the past to review/evaluate the Y2K Plan and various gas control functions. Charlie

emails.subject: RE: Need for Rutherford Consulting Complete
emails.body: The first problem is finding the time and money to do something and given everything else that is going on, right now is not the best time to be spending some money. To get the outside contractor taken care of we would have to let GSS find us a party to do the work, so you might want to be thinking of other parties who might be qualified to do the work.
